reviews.review_description: This is by far one of my favorite games I’ve ever played not just because you get to make your own game in it, but you also can rate these various different games and these games are just trolls or people just making really weird games and you even have your own assistant ““ and it’s really fun and cool and these physics are amazing and overall I think it is my favorite game I’ve ever played

Brings me back to the 90s loved every minute of the game. Had a wonderful time , fun and sad 😔 thanks for all your hard work ❤️ 👋  and if the ending is true I'm so sorry 😞 your family would be so proud of you. You are definitely someone special 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟 🌟 🤩 ⭐️ 🌠 💫

I bought the game today and it was everything I’d ever ask for in a game. It really teaches you a lot about how developers make their games and I ended up talking to the developer for a bit and he was the kindest developer I’ve ever met he was helpful and kind. He really helped me with all the questions I had and answered them all with great advice. Perfect game and the best developer.

The video of how he was doing it for his parents because of debt and how they passed away, at first I thought it was a fake story made for the game, but when I saw the video and his game next to their graves, I cried and this is the first vr game to ever make me cry, you did an amazing job man and I know your parents would be proud of you, we can’t wait to see what the future holds for you and we are all looking forward to other games you bring out, good job man.

This game surprised me from the start to finish with its well polished, interactive, and deep story/world that was so unique and fun to play. I appreciate games with secrets and side tasks that keep you engaged the whole time. All in all it was a very solid experience that I would recommend to anyone. PS; DEVS please keep adding updates!!

this game is genuinly, and i mean GENUINLY, SO GOOD. and im not over exaggerating or anything, it is probably one of the most cool and immersive experiences ive had on vr in a while. 

Amazing Story

Sad Ending ( made me tear up )

Overall: 10/10 Game with more to come.

Game Dev Simulator is a surprisingly immersive love letter to the highs and lows of game development. It nails the chaos of juggling projects, side tasks, and the occasional mini-game crisis (of which there are three so far). The pixel-art style and meta-humor (shoutout to Pixel Ripped 1995 vibes!) make it instantly engaging, while the challenges feel frustratingly authentic—just like real dev life.
Early access means room to grow (more mini-games, deeper mechanics?), but the foundation is solid. If you’ve ever wondered why game devs look exhausted, play this. Spoiler: It’s not as easy as it looks to be part of a studio and please players. A must-try for aspiring devs and curious gamers alike!

This game is genuinely amazing, the game itself takes you through a game developer store funding small games and playing them it's very fun and the controllers are very smartly implemented. The side missions are very fun cause they help you find some secrets, finding secrets was super fun. But anyway, the game itself is amazing, fun and refreshing. I loved every second of it. The ending was very heartfelt and gets you right into the feels. It makes an impact on you, this might be the best vr game i've played and i think everyone should buy it and support this developer to make more games.

This game is just like job simulator but instead of working at a job, you’re a game developer.￼ plus this simulator is so relaxing. You could change the music, the background, the background of your computer, and cursor of your mouse. though this game is very very emotional like when I say emotional, I mean, like really emotional once you get further into the game, that’s when it starts to hit you like a bazooka. but nothing stops the simulator from being the best￼. I really hope this developer makes some more games in the future.

This is the first time I’ve written a review for a game, so apologies if its a little crude. But man…what a game. While short in its length (I completed it in an hour), its got so much care put into it and that’s not to mention the fun times had within. The story itself, whether true or not (and you’ll have to play to understand that), is one that is sure to make you emotional, and overall just a good story. An ending to make you cry. Honestly, coming from someone who debated becoming a game dev and decided against it, this game was a knock out of the park homerun, especially in today’s age of games all trying to be like one another. I can’t wait to see what else is getting added, and my hats off to the developer. Don’t let any hate get you down man, this game is worth every penny.

reviews.review_title: Amazing idea and worth every cent

It's an idea no one has done before in vr and it's what alot of devs have to go through just to get a game that actually sticks with their audience it's worth every cent in my opinion if i could I would rate this game 10/10

reviews.review_title: The best game I ever played
reviews.review_description: I usually don't play simulators as often but I was scrolling around on the internet and I found this game and it was worth the 10 dollars the creative freedom and the progression was fun to do (I wonder if the boss comes back🤔) when I got to the ending I never teared up in a vr game this hard  before😢. But overall best game I ever bought (and I'm sorry about your parents)
